calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. No Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff Kelly Maire Wilson, for failure to Arbitrate is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by : Valerie Papale (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2004 Continued To Aug-19-04 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff In Propria Persona, for failure to arbitrate is heard this day. Court ordered Plaintiff in Propria Persona sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set 8/19/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212)
